arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe makes Man United feelings on Bruno Fernandes clear ahead of Ruben Amorim arrival
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes made his 250th appearance for Manchester United in Sunday's Premier League clash with Leicester City

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag spotted at former club as he plots route back into football after Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is back in the Netherlands after being sacked by Manchester United and has been filling his time by going to watch Eredivisie matches on the weekends

arts.ttl: Follow live: Man United host Leicester in Van Nistelrooy's last game in charge
arts.sum: Manchester United host Leicester City as interim head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy oversees his last game in charge at Old Trafford before Rúben Amorim takes over

arts.ttl: De Zerbi reveals Man Utd contract offer to Marseille players
arts.sum: Roberto De Zerbi showed Marseille's players a blurred-out contract offer from Manchester United ahead of the club's first game of the season, according to reports. De Zerbi reportedly showed his players the contract before Marseille's 5-1 away win at Stade Brest in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy explains Alejandro Garnacho decision for Manchester United vs Leicester
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Leicester on Sunday and the game is Ruud van Nistelrooy's last match as interim manager.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals true feelings on Ruben Amorim in final Man Utd programme notes
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy's future is in question with Ruben Amorim's arrival as manager coming on Monday, leaving the Dutchman, who rejoined the club as assistant manager in the summer, to wait and see

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy names the major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim as Man Utd manager before he starts work at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops major Man Utd transfer hint
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim drops a major transfer hint before he starts work as the new Man Utd manager.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi makes feelings perfectly clear on Man Utd star Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Manchester United might have had a difficult time over the last year and a half, but Alejandro Garnacho has clearly caught the eye of Argentina team-mate Lionel Messi

arts.ttl: Man Utd OPEN TALKS to sign Harry Maguire successor
arts.sum: Manchester United have opened talks to sign Bayer Leverkusen centre back Jonathan Tah . Fichajes report that United are in talks to sign Tah, where he would be a replacement for Harry Maguire.
